combined_text: Why Hasnât My Vet Heard of the Modern Treatment for Coccidia? Ask a Vet Share this image Why Hasn’t My Vet Heard of the Modern Treatment for Coccidia? Ponazuril is the newest, best treatment for coccidia in kittens.
